name: orchestrator-actor
title: Hiring Signal Orchestrator
description: Reads all signals, scores them with Claude, applies decay, and triggers enrichment actors

input.title: Input
input.description: Scoring thresholds, credentials, and user profile for the discovery pipeline.

anthropicApiKey.title: Anthropic API Key
anthropicApiKey.description: Anthropic API key used to score signals and draft outreach.

userProfile.title: User profile
userProfile.description: Skills, background, and wins used to personalize scoring and drafts.

skills.title: Skills
skills.description: List of relevant technical or domain skills.

background.title: Professional background
background.description: Short summary of the user's background.

pastWins.title: Past wins
pastWins.description: Specific accomplishments to reference in outreach.

scoreThreshold.title: Score threshold
scoreThreshold.description: Signals below this score will not trigger contact lookup or draft generation.

hunterApiKey.title: Hunter.io API Key
hunterApiKey.description: Hunter.io API key used by the contact finder actor.

apolloApiKey.title: Apollo.io API Key
apolloApiKey.description: Apollo.io API key used as a fallback by the contact finder actor.

lookbackDays.title: Days to look back
lookbackDays.description: Only process signals that are newer than this many days.
